MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-27-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT YULIYA GREBYONKINA IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,975.66 PLUS COSTS. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SHOW COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT YULIYA GREBYONKINA

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendant Yuliya Grebyonkina.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff San Francisco Fire Credit Union's motion for entry of judgment Against Defendant Yuliya Grebyonkina is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment in its favor in the amount of $10,975.66 plus costs. Counsel for plaintiff is to provide a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling, a separate proposed judgment and show compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Text Ruling
